name: Asparagus Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon salt and a dash of pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the asparagus and discard any tough stems. Set aside some spears for decoration.
2. Cut up the remaining asparagus into 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Place the pieces in a saucepan with water, bring to a boil, and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Drain and rinse under cold water.
5. Prepare the pie crust and refrigerate until ready to use.
6. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Cook the bacon until crispy and drain it on paper towels.
8. Place the cooked bacon, cheese, and asparagus pieces into the prepared pie shell.
9. In a medium bowl, beat together the eggs, cream, nutmeg, salt, and pepper until just combined.
10. Pour the egg mixture over the filling in the pie crust.
11. Arrange the reserved asparagus spears on top of the quiche.
12. Bake for 40 minutes or until puffed and golden brown. Serve warm.
